physician_led_definition: Clinician equity on cap table plus formal KOL advisory (SAB/CAB or RI Clinician-Entrepreneur Network match). Slater seed: $200K–$400K with required third-party financing match. See physician_led_financing for slater_investment_policy and 18-month gates per asset.
framing: Investable units are patent-defined technology packages. Many are university or hospital assignees with OTL/BRF licensing paths, not standalone incorporated startups.
scoring_note: Promise tier (A/B/C) combines patent cluster depth, active federal funding, clinical/regulatory signal, and clarity of license vehicle. Not investment advice.

opportunities.title: Wireless neurograins & distributed cortical implants
opportunities.thesis: Brown’s wireless neurograin stack replaces tethered Utah arrays with a scalable microscale mesh—backed by DARPA-scale funding and a dense continuation family through the 2020s. Value is an OTL spinout or exclusive license to a hardware partner before cortical BCI consolidates around a few implant vendors.
opportunities.headline: DARPA-scale wireless neurograins—dense cortical sensing without Utah-array tethers.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Brown OTL spinout after ~$19M DARPA + UH2—hardware path parallel to BrainGate decode IP.

opportunities.title: Speech decoding & multi-device tablet iBCI
opportunities.thesis: BrainGate-era decode IP is separating from electrode hardware: recruiting speech and tablet trials (NCT05724173 family) plus fresh U01/VA awards de-risk software and algorithm licensing. Best fit is consortium or co-development with device strategics (Blackrock, Synchron)—not a capital-intensive implant startup.
opportunities.headline: Recruiting speech and tablet iBCI trials—decode IP distinct from electrode vendors.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: U01 + VA funding with NCT05724173 family—consortium license or device co-development.

opportunities.title: Nanopieces non-viral RNA / nanocarrier delivery
opportunities.thesis: RIH-owned non-viral RNA nanocarriers sit inside an active STTR track at NanoDe but retain licensable field-of-use beyond the startup’s current scope. Extrahepatic and ortho/CNS indications are the venture wedge—partner with NanoDe or stand up a second newco after rodent delivery PoC.
opportunities.headline: Hospital-owned non-viral RNA nanocarriers—STTR-backed with expanded field-of-use option.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: RIH assignee + R41TR002298—license to NanoDe or second newco beyond current scope.

opportunities.title: Chitinase-1 inhibition for pulmonary fibrosis (OCF-203 family)
opportunities.thesis: A single composition-of-matter-style CHIT1/CHI3L1 asset anchors decades of NHLBI P01 fibrosis science (Jack Elias, Brown origin). Near-term value is sublicense or asset purchase diligence on OCF-203 status inside the Ocean Biomedical / Elkurt stack—not greenfield discovery.
opportunities.headline: Chitinase-1 IPF composition with decades of NHLBI P01 support—license diligence on OCF-203.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Brown-origin US11717528B2—sublicense or asset path via Ocean / Elkurt corporate stack.

opportunities.title: Lab-grown decellularized ECM morsels (injectable matrix therapy)
opportunities.thesis: Human MSC-derived ECM morsels (~200 µm) are injectable matrix therapy with published functional benefit in MI models (PMID 39705507) and a live Slater-backed RI spinout (XM Therapeutics). Formation capital funds large-animal PoP; exit comps are cardiac matrix and regenerative medtech strategics.
opportunities.headline: Injectable human ECM morsels for HF and IPF—Slater-seeded Brown spinout.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Slater $375K + BBII—large-animal PoP before Heartseed-class Series A.

opportunities.title: IAIP biologics & rapid LFIA for sepsis/NEC/HIE
opportunities.thesis: ProThera’s four-filing estate plus ~$3.7M active SBIR supports parallel paths: plasma-derived IAIP biologic and rapid LFIA for NICU sepsis/NEC. Physician-founder equity and MeMed/Inotrem comps frame a $5–10M Series A once clinical-enabling milestones land.
opportunities.headline: Dual-path NICU play—IAIP biologic plus rapid LFIA on active SBIR stack.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: ~$3.7M+ active SBIR—physician-founder equity; Series A $5–10M band vs Inotrem/MeMed.

opportunities.title: Biological kyphoplasty / VCF — OsteoPearl cortical allograft & Elevoss cavity system
opportunities.thesis: Lenoss commercializes 100% cortical allograft kyphoplasty—no PMMA balloon—with linked OsteoPearl pearls and a deep granted patent stack (23+ cited in 2025 press). This is growth equity or strategic medtech, not university OTL formation.
opportunities.headline: Cortical allograft kyphoplasty without PMMA—commercial early with Series A traction.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: NEMIC + Commerce voucher—growth equity, not university OTL formation.

opportunities.title: Peripheral dendritic-cell blockade for Alzheimer's (MITI-101)
opportunities.thesis: MITI-101 blocks recruitment of CD11c+ peripheral innate cells into the AD brain—a mechanism orthogonal to amyloid mAbs—with URI Ryan Institute roots and a $30M Series A (Nov 2025). Co-invest or extension alongside Slater/RightHill fits after IND-enabling clarity.
opportunities.headline: Block dendritic recruitment to AD brain—$30M Series A with RI Hub IND grant.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: MITI-101 mAb post–Series A—co-invest or extension with Slater/RightHill in syndicate.

opportunities.title: Intelligent spinal interface & closed-loop DBS facilitation
opportunities.thesis: The intelligent spinal interface program is cortically distinct: DARPA-funded SCI rehab with an IDE path at RIH (NCT04302259). Capital expects a medtech strategic, SPV, or field-of-use license—not a consumer neurotech story.
opportunities.headline: DARPA intelligent spinal interface—SCI rehab IDE distinct from cortical BCI.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: DARPA $6.3M + NCT04302259—medtech strategic or SPV vs wireless neurograins.

opportunities.title: Tregitope regulatory T-cell epitope therapeutics
opportunities.thesis: EpiVax holds RI’s deepest immunoinformatics patent cluster—platform services ARR plus Tregitope therapeutic options. Investors should underwrite growth/strategic capital on license revenue, not a classic $400K Slater seed newco.
opportunities.headline: Deepest RI immunoinformatics patent cluster—platform ARR plus therapeutic spinouts.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Growth/strategic capital on Tregitope stack—not classic Slater seed formation.

opportunities.title: Biglycan musculoskeletal & neuromuscular regeneration
opportunities.thesis: BRF-held biglycan biology targets utrophin upregulation for neuromuscular restoration with no mapped RI startup—classic Brown OTL out-license. A physician KOL SAB plus Slater seed follows in vivo PoC, not before.
opportunities.headline: BRF biglycan MSK regeneration—classic Brown OTL out-license with no RI startup mapped.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Preclinical academic package—physician KOL SAB + Slater seed after PoC.

opportunities.title: Core neural signal decoding & cortical interface (Donoghue era)
opportunities.thesis: Donoghue-era foundational BMI patents may gate FTO for every new cortical interface entrant. Diligence on encumbrances versus wireless and speech sub-families determines whether value is royalty stack, narrow field-of-use license, or defensive acquisition.
opportunities.headline: Foundational BMI decode patents—FTO diligence essential for new neurotech entrants.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Royalty or field-of-use license vs wireless/speech sub-families.

opportunities.title: AI-guided atrial fibrillation ablation mapping (VX1)
opportunities.thesis: Volta’s FDA-cleared VX1 SaMD shortens AF ablation cases with AI substrate mapping—protected claims on a ~€74M VC trajectory. Formation is complete; opportunity is growth or strategic medtech, not Slater physician-match.
opportunities.headline: FDA-cleared AI AF ablation mapping—growth-stage SaMD with protected claims.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: ~€74M VC path—strategic or growth round, not formation.

opportunities.title: Hybridization-assisted nanopore / electronic genome mapping
opportunities.thesis: Brown-origin electronic genome mapping (Nabsys, Hitachi-backed) competes in structural variant detection where NGS leaves gaps. Exit logic is strategic M&A or royalty on OhmX adoption—not seed-stage company formation.
opportunities.headline: Electronic genome mapping (Nabsys)—commercial Brown-origin IP with strategic exit paths.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: NHGRI R43HG004433 heritage; Hitachi interest—M&A/royalty, not Slater seed.

opportunities.title: Encapsulated cell therapy for retinal degeneration (CNTF)
opportunities.thesis: A broad encapsulated cell therapy (CNTF) estate in Cumberland RI underpins late-stage ophthalmology commercialization (including 2025 MacTel approval). Investors pursue secondary liquidity, royalties, or asset M&A—not de novo spinout capital.
opportunities.headline: Eight-filing ECT estate with 2025 MacTel approval—liquidity and royalty plays.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: Mature commercial rollout—secondary M&A/royalty, not Slater seed.

opportunities.title: Deep RNA transcriptomic ICU diagnostics (host + pathogen)
opportunities.thesis: One ICU blood draw yields >100M-read deep RNA: host immune deconvolution (splicing, NMD) plus pathogen/AMR signal from unmapped reads—orthogonal to ProThera biologic and Levine wearable ML. RIH patents and NIGMS R35 support a physician-led Dx spinout before national blood-RNA platforms scale.
opportunities.headline: One blood draw, full transcriptome—faster pathogen ID than culture, with host splicing biomarkers.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: RIH-owned deep RNA platform + NIGMS R35 + Brown RNA Center—physician-founder spinout before national blood-RNA Dx scale-up.

opportunities.title: MuSK-pathway ASO neurogenesis (Bolden Therapeutics)
opportunities.thesis: Bolden holds Brown OTL rights to MuSK Ig3 exon-skipping ASOs that release adult hippocampal neurogenesis—distinct from biglycan MSK and MindImmune innate blockade. Slater/Lifespan pre-seed capital buys IND-enabling runway in a re-opened neuro restoration niche.
opportunities.headline: ASO switch for neural stem-cell quiescence—Brown Fallon/Webb science in a Slater-backed Providence newco.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: NIA STTR + $1.5M pre-seed (Slater, Lifespan Vision)—formation capital before Big Pharma neurogenesis comparables.

opportunities.title: AAV2–VEGF gene therapy for tendon & ligament repair (PAX-001)
opportunities.thesis: Pax Therapeutics delivers local AAV2–VEGF at tendon repair sites, with preclinical signals of accelerated collagen maturation (~350% tensile strength in flexor models). RIH-origin IP, ~$1.7M seed, and pre-IND work position hand flexor first, then ACL/Achilles—with chairman-surgeon governance.
opportunities.headline: One-shot gene therapy at repair—faster, stronger tendon healing than surgery alone.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: RIH-origin patents + ~$1.7M seed + RILSH LIFT for IND—physician-chairman Liu MD with pre-IND complete.

opportunities.title: LUMIS optical theranostics — intraoperative see-and-treat oncology
opportunities.thesis: LUMIS combines multispectral fluorescence guidance with intraoperative photodynamic therapy—see-and-treat in one OR workflow—with Kersey/CytoVeris patent linkage and Mayo bronchoscopy collaboration. Medtech growth or strategic partnership fits after clinical validation, not university OTL seed.
opportunities.headline: See malignant margins and treat in the same OR workflow—AI-guided optical theranostics.
opportunities.opportunity_hook: RILSH attraction award + Ocean State Labs + Mayo know-how—medtech growth, not university OTL.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: SMURF2–HIF1α oncology
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: 3 primary Brown HIF/p53 filings linked (USPTO ODP); no SMURF-Therapeutics assignee — license from Brown OTL. Penn State p53 background families excluded from key list.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: HIF-pathway oncology with Welireg-scale commercial proof—harvest El-Deiry estate.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: R01CA173453 + SMURF-Tx Providence—Slater seed after biomarker PoC.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: primary — HIF-1α / p53 oncology matches SMURF2–HIF1α asset science; assignee mismatch vs company name
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.science_field: Oncology — hypoxia / tumor suppressor pathway therapeutics
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Brown’s SMURF2–HIF1α oncology estate (El-Deiry) aligns with Welireg-era proof that HIF biology can support premium oncology pricing—while assignee diligence still maps SMURF-Therapeutics to OTL. Slater-scale capital follows biomarker-selected solid-tumor PoC, not platform hype.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: SOMA interoception / pain digital therapeutic
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: No USPTO applications for Petzschner/Gunsilius (ODP 404). COBRE P20GM103645 — interoception/pain DTx likely SaMD/trade secret, not patent-defined unit.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: COBRE-backed interoception pain DTx—spinout forming from Carney.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Kaia-class financing vs Pear Ch.11 payer lesson—SaMD path after pivotal pilot.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: none — digital therapeutic / computational psychiatry field has no matching US patent annex
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.science_field: Digital health — interoception / chronic pain DTx
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: SOMAScience translates Carney COBRE interoception science into a chronic-pain digital therapeutic—grant-first (P20GM103645) without USPTO product filings today. Reimbursement and pivotal pilot design are the gates; comps are Kaia-scale DTx raises, with Pear Chapter 11 as payer-risk lesson.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: HiTIMED / immune epigenetic deconvolution
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: HiTIMED US+EP+PCT linked (Dartmouth assignee). Brown collaborator on grants — OTL sublicense diligence. Adjacent methylation classifier + glioma PCT in curated annex.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: HiTIMED immune epigenetic deconvolution—Dartmouth EP pending, Brown collaborator.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: R01 stack + EP4505463A1—pharma license model, not classic biotech VC.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: primary — immune TME epigenetic deconvolution matches HiTIMED asset science
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: HiTIMED immune epigenetic deconvolution (Dartmouth EP/PCT; Brown collaborator on R01CA253976) packages tumor microenvironment signatures for pharma trial enrichment. Economics are signature licensing and sponsored research—not a standalone therapeutic Series A.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: KIWI wireless micro-implant BCI (ni2o)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: 19+ Howard/Genesis Intelligence KIWI filings (representative 3 in key list). No ni2o assignee — map company via Howard license. Brown BrainGate wireless patents are separate FTO (theme neurotech).
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: KIWI wireless micro-implant BCI—Providence HQ with BrainGate FTO diligence.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Nurosene partnership + strategic path—harvest Howard/ni2o USPTO vs Brown patents.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: primary — wireless cranial micro-implant BCI matches KIWI asset science; corporate assignee is Genesis Intelligence not ni2o Inc
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Genesis Intelligence’s KIWI wireless micro-implant family (19+ filings; ni2o Providence HQ) targets low-burden BCI with Nurosene partnership momentum. BrainGate/Brown wireless FTO diligence is mandatory before strategic or growth capital.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Wearable pediatric sepsis ML (Levine / Garbern)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: Grant-first (R33TW012211); no USPTO filing for Levine wearable sepsis product in ODP—orthogonal to Monaghan RNA Dx and ProThera IAIP biologic.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: Wearable ML for earlier pediatric sepsis recognition—validated in Bangladesh ICU cohort.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: FIC R33TW012211 → US SaMD path; pairs with RIH RNA Dx stack.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: none — publications + grants; not patent-defined today
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.science_field: Digital health — pediatric sepsis early warning
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Wearable vitals plus ML flagged advanced pediatric sepsis hours ahead of routine documentation in prospective Bangladesh ICU work (PMID 39475844, 41252746)—grant-backed via R33TW012211. US value is SaMD classification and health-system pilot, complementing Monaghan RNA Dx and ProThera biologic in a stacked sepsis portfolio.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: PHLIP peptide–LNP nucleic acid & STING delivery (URI)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: URI Board of Trustees assignee; distinct from Brown/RIH Nanopieces—intracellular pH-triggered delivery.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: URI PHLIP delivers cargo into acidic tissues—LNP and STING programs without classic endocytosis.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: URI tech transfer → RI spinout or license; Engelman/Reshetnyak PHLIP science (PMID 24659971).
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.patent_science_association: primary — PHLIP delivery matches RNA/innate immuno asset science
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: PHLIP peptides insert at acidic pH to deliver LNPs and STING payloads without classical endocytosis—URI’s WO family competes on tumor microenvironment selectivity versus liver-default genetic medicine. URI tech transfer → RI spinout or license after rodent tumor delivery PoC.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Salivary EV biomarkers for Alzheimer's disease (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: RIH assignee; liquid biopsy from saliva—distinct from blood RNA-seq Monaghan line.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: Salivary extracellular vesicles as a non-invasive Alzheimer's liquid biopsy.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: RIH/Brown R01AG074284 supports analytical development; path to CLIA LDT then spinout.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Salivary EV RNA offers a less invasive Alzheimer’s liquid-biopsy lane as plasma p-tau tests gain FDA traction—RIH/Brown R01AG074284 funds analytical work toward CLIA LDT, then Dx spinout. US20260103757A1 anchors assignee IP distinct from Monaghan deep blood RNA.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: BX-912 for pulmonary hypertension (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: PCT WO2026112526; small-molecule PH therapeutic—verify PI and hospital license chain.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: BX-912 program for pulmonary hypertension—RIH PCT with multi-center inventor team.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Preclinical PH models → IND-enabling; benchmark against 2024 PAH biologic approval.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: RIH’s BX-912 PAH program (WO2026112526) enters a market reset by 2024’s first-in-class biologic approval—clear regulatory benchmarks, crowded chemistry. Value is IND-enabling PoC plus cardio newco or license after PI and hospital chain-of-title diligence.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: PAH / sudden cardiac death diagnostics (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: US20180094317 family; companion Dx to BX-912 PH program or standalone risk stratification.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: RIH diagnostic panel for pulmonary arterial hypertension and sudden cardiac death risk.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Mature US20180094317 family; retrospective → prospective validation.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: A mature RIH Dx family (US20180094317; Dudley/Ventetuolo) targets PAH and sudden cardiac death risk stratification—companion to BX-912 or standalone. Retrospective cohort success must convert to prospective registry data before license or seed Dx pricing power.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: BBB-crossing nucleic acid delivery (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: WO2025171161; CNS delivery platform—FTO vs AAV and other BBB approaches.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: RIH platform for nucleic acid delivery across the blood–brain barrier.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Qian Chen (NanoDe peer) leads BBB nucleic delivery PCT; partner or license path.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Qian Chen’s BBB nucleic-delivery PCT (WO2025171161) addresses the bottleneck for CNS genetic medicines—rodent PoC unlocks gene-therapy option deals, not near-term product revenue. FTO versus Denali/Voyager-style shuttles is the partner conversation starter.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Motile injectable cell for MSK repair (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: WO2025155768; regenerative cell therapy for connective tissue—distinct from XM ECM morsels.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: Motile injectable cell therapy to accelerate meniscus and connective-tissue repair.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: NIAMS R01AR080726 + R21AR077326 (Jayasuriya); large-animal next gate.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Motile injectable cell therapy for meniscus and connective tissue (WO2025155768) pairs NIAMS awards (R01AR080726, R21AR077326) with peer-reviewed meniscus/PTOA signals (PMID 36312551, 39763468). Distinct from XM ECM morsels; large-animal data is the Slater gate.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Biomimetic ECM for joint tissue repair (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: US20240139376; ECM reconstitution for joint repair—adjacent science to XM Therapeutics morsels.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: Biomimetic ECM reconstitution for musculoskeletal joint repair.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Field-of-use diligence vs XM Therapeutics before Slater-scale spinout.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: RIH ECM reconstitution filings (US20240139376) target joint repair adjacent to XM Therapeutics’ injectable morsels—field-of-use clearance versus Brown/XM OTL is the commercial unlock. No investor formation until FOU and orthopedic pilot design are documented.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Enhancer RNA targeting for primary brain tumors (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: US20230323349; eRNA oncology—distinct from HiTIMED epigenetic deconvolution.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: Enhancer RNA–targeted approach for primary brain tumors.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Tapinos-led RIH/Brown program; glioma model efficacy before neuro-onc seed.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: Enhancer-RNA targeting (US20230323349; Tapinos) opens a non-coding axis in glioma where standard of care still fails most patients. R21CA235415-backed translational planning precedes neuro-onc seed—efficacy in relevant models is the milestone investors will underwrite.

gaps_not_in_curated_patents.title: Lp(a)-lowering therapeutic approach (RIH)
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.note: WO2025245119 PCT; cardiovascular Lp(a)—crowded class (verify differentiation vs hepatocyte therapies).
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.headline: RIH therapeutic approach to lower lipoprotein(a)—cardiovascular metabolic niche.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.opportunity_hook: Differentiate vs Phase 3 siRNA/antisense leaders; Song lab R01HL159204 anchors cardio lipid biology.
gaps_not_in_curated_patents.thesis: RIH’s Lp(a) PCT (WO2025245119) lands as Novartis and Amgen run Phase 3 outcomes trials—no approved Lp(a)-specific drug yet, so pharma option economics dominate. Song lab R01HL159204 supplies cardio lipid credibility; differentiation versus siRNA/antisense leaders is the diligence centerpiece.
